forecasts.rationale: Extreme Fear at 11/100 (down 12 points) signals capitulation-adjacent sentiment, historically a mild contrarian positive but also consistent with continued selling pressure in the near term; funding rates are near neutral (0.01%) indicating the crowded-long concern is minimal; with sentiment this depressed, downside skew and modest volatility widening are warranted across all horizons, but adjustments remain small given near-random-walk dynamics and the possibility that extreme fear marks a local bottom.
